checkin.journal:
Slept not good second day of antibiotics - but today before bed I am getting sleepy and I can tell its going to work
Woke up super early could not sleep it was 5:20 but since we moved clock it was 4:20 on old watch so yeah - 2 days of probiotics made some havocs in my guts
Morning stretching also did some arm exercises - was interesting that I could not lift my right arm - its very weak and if I apply more pressure it hurts
Was working a bit
Breakfast eggs ajvar cheese daamn so good
Spoke to Bor
